title: Eva cast sings Frozen
wikitext:
[]: Eva cast sings Frozen?             Quote Post by Dataprime » Sun Nov 16, 2014 5:26 pm Well this is certainly the weirdest video I seen all week

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Nov 16, 2014 5:44 pm What. Did. I. Just. watch? I need a drink.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Sun Nov 16, 2014 8:44 pm That was like clicking on a link that somehow puts you right in the middle of Arael's mind-rape beam.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Nov 16, 2014 9:16 pm Wow that was worth it. Holy cow did they sound great.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 16, 2014 9:33 pm Looking at the credits page , it looks like these were all CV imitations, or am I missing something?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Nov 16, 2014 11:37 pm Ornette wrote: Looking at the credits page , it looks like these were all CV imitations, or am I missing something?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 17, 2014 5:26 am Merde.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Mon Nov 17, 2014 9:01 pm Oh, no. Now there's gonna be EVA/Frozen crossover fanfiction after this...

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Nov 17, 2014 10:22 pm Grand Duke of Yashima wrote: Oh, no. Now there's gonna be EVA/Frozen crossover fanfiction after this...

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Nov 18, 2014 1:08 am I can probably find some images of that for you. Okay, so I found this, but it's not great IMAO. Anna's head looks weird. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue Nov 18, 2014 7:14 am Chuckman wrote: Don't tempt me.
